message:
fix(tui): align NTM_REDUCE_MOTION parsing with styles.reducedMotionEnabled()

Updates the environment variable parsing for NTM_REDUCE_MOTION to use
the same truthy/falsy logic as the styles package, accepting any value
except explicit negatives (0, false, no, off, empty string).

Previous behavior: Only "1" or "true" enabled reduce motion
New behavior: Any non-empty, non-negative value enables reduce motion

This aligns with user expectations where setting NTM_REDUCE_MOTION=yes
or NTM_REDUCE_MOTION=enabled will now correctly enable reduced motion
mode for less animation flicker (fixes #32).

Also normalizes input by trimming whitespace and lowercasing before
comparison for more robust parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
